revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-4-115

Base line extension monitor (in Loran)

A Loran C monitor station installed on the base line extension usually on a temporary basis, to assist in the setting up of a Loran C system.
